items.title: Mutual fund NFO: Only one passive fund opens for subscription this week. Check dates, details
items.summary: A new passive fund from Zerodha is launching this week. The Zerodha Nifty LargeMidcap250 Plus 8-13 yr G-Sec 70:30 Index Fund will open for subscription on April 1 and close on April 15. This open-ended scheme will replicate the Nifty LargeMidcap250 Plus 8-13 yr G-Sec 70:30 Index. Investors can start with a minimum of Rs 100.

items.title: 8 midcap stocks with massive upside potential of up to 75%. Do you own any?
items.summary: Analyst estimates highlight select BSE mid-cap stocks with strong upside potential over the next year. Based on Trendlyne data, these stocks offer projected gains driven by improving fundamentals and positive sentiment. With consensus Buy or Strong Buy ratings, they present compelling opportunities for investors seeking high-growth mid-cap ideas.

items.title: Market trading guide: Buy ACME Solar and Dalmia Bharat on Monday for short-term gains up to 16%. Here’s why
items.summary: Nifty snapped its two-day rally amid weak sentiment driven by Iran-US tensions, high energy prices, and a falling rupee. Technical indicators signal continued bearish momentum. Experts suggest a sell-on-rise strategy, while recommending ACME Solar and Dalmia Bharat as bullish breakout trades with near-term upside potential.

items.title: Ahead of market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Monday
items.summary: Indian markets ended a two-day rally as Iran-US tensions and elevated energy prices weighed on investor sentiment. Nifty fell 2.09% to 22,819.60, Sensex down 2.25%. US and European indices also declined amid geopolitical uncertainty. Financials, autos, and consumer stocks led losses, while volatility remained elevated.

items.title: US Stocks Markets | Lucrative bets that anticipated Trump's policy surprises warrant scrutiny, experts say
items.summary: Well-timed trades ahead of U.S. President Donald Trump's major policy surprises ​during his second term have potentially led to millions of dollars in profits for unknown ​traders, leading some legal experts to say they should be investigated to protect fair markets and ascertain whether information is leaking.

items.title: British Ice Skating Federation To Formally Challenge World Championships Results
items.summary: Can a British Ice Skating challenge overturn the 2026 World championships results? After Lilah Fear and Lewis Gibson lost a medal over a controversial call, British Ice Skating announced a formal challenge of the results.

items.title: Jio Financial Services expects to begin life, general insurance biz in 2026
items.summary: Jio Financial Services (JFS) is hoping to start general and life insurance businesses this year, a top company official has said.

items.title: The NBA's Proposed Anti-Tanking Reforms Could Backfire Spectacularly
items.summary: The league's proposals could inherently punish legitimately terrible teams by decreasing their chances of getting out of the league's basement in a timely fashion.

items.summary: Phil Foden is fighting to prove himself for club and country with the midfielder struggling to find consistent form.

items.summary: FC Barcelona has been rocked by the news that forward Raphinha will be out injured for a month to five weeks. So what now for Hansi Flick and his men?

items.summary: How is public opinion about AI and the future of humanity being shaped? A recent survey provides great insights. I unpack the results. An AI Insider analysis.

items.summary: Claressa Shields reacted to Keith Thurman's TKO loss to Sebastian Fundora. Their beef dates back to 2024. Full breakdown.
